creator: zaks@prioris.mini.pw.edu.pl
text:
qt22 port fails to compile - many errors regarding lack o qutil
	library, qt library, moc missing. It's all because of renaming
	those to libqt2 and moc2

Fix: 

Update generated Makefiles to contain -lqt2 and moc2 instead of
	-lqt and moc
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just type make build
